approved_command_preview: Guard PR #296 at head 89279edc09caf4fefb7f47a3042367f81c60a44a; repair only the corrupted literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels fixture; run regression selftest, pareto context selftest, py_compile, CodeQL workflow validation, and git diff --check; commit and push the PR branch only if validation passes.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$repo = $env:DCOIR_REPO_ROOT
$branch = 'fix/dcoir-review-path-write-sentinel-290'
$expectedHead = '89279edc09caf4fefb7f47a3042367f81c60a44a'
$worktree = Join-Path $env:RUNNER_TEMP 'pr296-regression-fixture-worktree'
if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $worktree) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $worktree -Recurse -Force }

git -C $repo fetch origin $branch
git -C $repo worktree add -B $branch $worktree "origin/$branch"
$actualHead = (git -C $worktree rev-parse HEAD).Trim()
if ($actualHead -ne $expectedHead) {
  throw "Expected PR branch head $expectedHead but found $actualHead. Refusing to patch stale branch."
}

git -C $worktree config user.name 'ChatGPT Exec'
git -C $worktree config user.email 'actions@github.com'

$patchScript = Join-Path $env:RUNNER_TEMP 'fix_pr296_regression_fixture.py'
@'
import sys
from pathlib import Path

root = Path(sys.argv[1])
path = root / "scripts" / "openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py"
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

bad = '''literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels = mod.detect_risk_senuls(
    """dif --git a/tools/safe_writer.py b/tools/safe_writer.py
index 0000000...1111111 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/safe_writer.py
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+def write_summary(note, output_dir):
+    destination = Path(output_dir / "summary.txt")>
+    destination.write_text(note, fandoding="utf-8")
"""
)
assert not any(item.label == mod.FILE_WRITE_PATH_LABEL for item in literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels)
'''

good = '''literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels = mod.detect_risk_sentinels(
    """diff --git a/tools/safe_writer.py b/tools/safe_writer.py
index 0000000..1111111 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/safe_writer.py
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+def write_summary(note, output_dir):
+    destination = Path(output_dir / "summary.txt")
+    destination.write_text(note, encoding="utf-8")
"""
)
assert not any(item.label == mod.FILE_WRITE_PATH_LABEL for item in literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels)
'''

if bad not in text:
    raise SystemExit("expected corrupted literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels block not found")

fixed = text.replace(bad, good, 1)
markers = ["detect_risk_senuls", "fandoding", "summary.txt")>", "dif --git", "0000000...1111111"]
remaining = [marker for marker in markers if marker in fixed]
if remaining:
    raise SystemExit("corruption markers still present after replacement: " + repr(remaining))

with path.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="\n") as handle:
    handle.write(fixed)
print("patched literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels fixture block")
'@ | Set-Content -LiteralPath $patchScript -Encoding UTF8

python $patchScript $worktree

Push-Location $worktree
try {
  python scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  python scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_selftest.py
  python -m py_compile scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_selftest.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  python scripts/validate-codeql-security-workflow.py
  git diff --check
  $status = git status --porcelain
  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace(($status | Out-String))) {
    throw 'No file changes detected after fixture repair.'
  }
  Write-Host 'Changed files before commit:'
  git status --short
  git diff -- scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  git add scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  git commit -m 'Fix path-write regression fixture'
  $newHead = (git rev-parse HEAD).Trim()
  git push origin "HEAD:$branch"
  Write-Host "pushed_head=$newHead"
}
finally {
  Pop-Location
}

git -C $repo worktree remove $worktree --force
